raw_consumer_statement: American Express Must provide clear breakdown on my payment history before dismissing all my claims. They must explain to us the reason they can not give a payment ledger reflecting a final balance of {$5800.00}. {$2500.00} surplus has been paid and can not be included in my final balance of {$3300.00}. if they can not give a clear accounting proving their claims and refuting my claims, then I will not make any payment until the issue is resolved. In American retaliatory and vindictive approach, they have reported my account 30 days late to the credit bureau. Shame on them because have refused to resolve my issue by virtue of me closing the account. I have the right to cancel when a company like American Express is having its representative calling me Because my balance has reached over XXXX XXXX and it has an appearance me of me not being able to afford it. I have a clean history of paying bills on time. Provide the fact because you are not being forthcoming.
